mapper.select:
SELECT p.project_id, p.project_title, p.project_describe, p.created_at, p.finish_date, c.default_describe AS status FROM project p LEFT JOIN common_code c ON p.status = c.common_id AND c.common_code = '0J'
p.project_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY p.project_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project p
p.project_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT p.project_id, p.project_title, p.project_describe, p.created_at, p.finish_date, c.default_describe AS status FROM project p LEFT OUTER JOIN common_code c ON p.status = c.common_id AND c.common_code = '0J' WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId}
